description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 28, 2025 at 12:36 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Fillmore Street near Page Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked at the curb facing south on Fillmore Street when an SUV attempting to parallel park in front of the Waymo AV 
reversed, and the rear of the SUV made contact with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's 
Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
